category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a simulator for HTTP-based APIs; official WireMock docs describe mocking APIs and HTTP services.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wiremock-standalone; source_facts.homepage is the official WireMock standalone running documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official WireMock standalone docs; official WireMock user documentation is hosted at wiremock.org/3.x/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official WireMock GitHub organization lists wiremock/wiremock as the Java project, and its README points to wiremock.org/docs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says simulator for HTTP-based APIs; source_facts.executables lists wiremock; official WireMock docs describe HTTP API mocking/testing.
